themes.label: Poor Customer Support
themes.description: Users report difficulty in getting help from the support team, with some experiencing unhelpful or dismissive responses.

themes.label: App Performance Issues
themes.description: Users report problems with app stability, slow performance, and syncing issues.

themes.label: User Experience and Interface
themes.description: Users are unhappy with the app's user experience, interface, and navigation.

themes.label: Features and Functionality
themes.description: Users are requesting additional features, improvements to existing ones, and better organization of the app.

themes.label: Security and Trust
themes.description: Users are concerned about data sharing, security, and the trustworthiness of the app.

quotes.text: most of time unable to purchase any stocks it keeps says 'something went wrong' please fix this to retain your customers
this is the best app for traders and investors for the long term because in this app brokerage charges are so negligible
The worst part is the customer support... you can request a call back... but that's only a dream... you never get a call back from IND money...

actionIdeas: Implement a more robust customer support system with faster response times and better follow-up.
Simplify the user interface, improve navigation, and add features to make the app more user-friendly.
Fix bugs and glitches in the app to improve user experience and add more features to make the app more user-friendly.
